name: HNoMS Sleipner (H 48)
events: 25 Sep 1940 HNoMS Sleipner is docked in the floating dock (AFD 3) at the Rosyth Dockyard. (1)
12 Nov 1940 HMS Zulu (Cdr. J.S. Crawford, DSO, RN) is again docked in No.3 graving dock at the Rosyth Dockyard. She is docked together with HNoMS Sleipner. (1)
16 Dec 1940 HMS Zulu (Cdr. J.S. Crawford, DSO, RN) and HNoMS Sleipner are undocked. (1)
19 Dec 1940 HMS Zulu (Cdr. J.S. Crawford, DSO, RN) and HNoMS Sleipner are docked in No.1 graving dock at the Rosyth Dockyard. (1)
19 Sep 1941 HNoMS Sleipner is docked in the floating dock (AFD 3) at the Rosyth Dockyard. (1)
